title: Navin's is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Navin's is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Navin's. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Property Advisor to strengthen our Ludhiana-based team.

About Navin's:
Navin's is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Referral bonus program
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ludhiana, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Navin's!
